overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk through Night City. The player moves from an open plaza beneath elevated highways, past neon-lit storefronts and street signs, with light vehicle traffic and sparse pedestrians visible in the golden hour sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward the mega building with holographic billboard

entered.detail: large vertical screen displaying a portrait advertisement on the left side of the plaza
tall futuristic skyscraper with large digital billboard displaying animated content
tropical palm tree visible against the skyline on the right side
massive steel and concrete overpass structure with multiple levels

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza with warm morning sunlight. A massive digital advertisement screen is visible on the left, while ahead looms a towering skyscraper with a holographic billboard. Palm trees and elevated highway structures frame the scene as the camera walks forward.

events.description: turns left and moves from open plaza into the shadowed area beneath the elevated highway structure
vehicles pass through the intersection ahead while traffic lights show red

agents.ego_description: turns left under the overpass and approaches the street intersection with active traffic

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: yellow street sign with 'Martin' text mounted on a black and yellow striped pole
traffic signal showing red light suspended from the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left and moves beneath the massive elevated highway, transitioning from open sky to a sheltered concrete environment. The scene becomes darker with mixed lighting as the camera approaches a street intersection. Vehicles drive through the crossing while a yellow 'Martin' street sign comes into view on the left.

events.description: passes the yellow Martin street sign on the left side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: person walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: row of shops with metal shutters and glass windows lining the right side
glowing purple and red neon sign attached to the building facade
scattered debris and cardboard pieces littering the concrete sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the narrow sidewalk beneath the continuous elevated highway, the camera passes the Martin street sign and continues past commercial storefronts with glowing neon signs. The sidewalk is littered with trash and debris. A pedestrian walks in the opposite direction, and vehicles continue to pass on the street to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corridor with industrial elements

events.description: passes street sign indicating 'Drake Ave' on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk alongside moderate traffic, approaching the next intersection

entered.detail: orange and white concrete barriers lining the edge of the sidewalk
street sign with 'Drake Ave' text visible on the right side
large industrial building with pipes and metallic structures

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues down the urban sidewalk with concrete barriers on the left and industrial buildings replacing the commercial storefronts. The elevated highway structure recedes into the distance overhead. The camera passes a 'Drake Ave' street sign and approaches the next intersection with moderate vehicle traffic flowing along the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched urban plaza into the shadowed, industrial corridors beneath a massive elevated highway. It begins in the warm morning light of a wide plaza, moving past palm trees and towering skyscrapers adorned with holographic billboards. As the camera turns left, the open sky is replaced by a sheltered concrete environment, shifting the lighting to a darker, mixed palette as it approaches a street intersection marked by a yellow Martin street sign. The scene then transitions along a narrow, debris-strewn sidewalk lined with glowing neon storefronts and passing pedestrians, while the highway structure remains a constant canopy overhead. Finally, the commercial shops give way to industrial buildings and concrete barriers as the camera passes a Drake Ave sign and approaches another busy intersection.
